projectDescription: A Turborepo-based monorepo hosting the KaroCar web platform, comprising multiple Next.js applications (web, admin, auth, customer, vendor, corporate) and a shared UI component library.
keyFeatures: Turborepo monorepo with task orchestration and caching
Six dedicated Next.js applications: web, admin, auth, customer, vendor, and corporate
Shared @karo-car/ui React component library consumed across apps
Shared ESLint and TypeScript configuration packages for consistent code quality
pnpm workspaces for efficient dependency management
Vercel Remote Cache support for distributed build caching
Tailwind CSS v4 for styling across all applications
Full TypeScript throughout with strict compiler settings
publicApiSurface: turbo run build — build all apps and packages
turbo run dev — start all apps in development mode
turbo run lint — lint all workspaces
turbo run check-types — typecheck all workspaces
turbo build --filter=<app> — build a specific app
